content:
INSERT DOWNLOAD PDF BUTTON#Profile (I can’t believe I ever led with this)#I have a proven track record of leading and driving change initiatives in a project capacity, as well as strong performance in a BAU role, delivering consistent results, and finding critical process or functional improvements. I bring the ability to seek opportunities and provide support in the delivery of outcomes, a willingness to learn, and a fresh outlook to any challenge.
Experience#Ministry of EducationFeb 2023 - PresentWeb AdviserExtraction and transformation of website data through GA4Creation of customized GTM tags to support content and marketing objectivesCreation of dynamic dashboards to support business development in Looker StudioCreation, management, and consulting relating to Survey Monkey surveysContent / Structural Management of all business Vimeo uploadsPerforming functional and accessibility testing of Ministry WebsitesCMS/Backend content uploading and editing in SilverStripe & DrupalAchievementsMigrated 100 Surveys from Legacy Forms Platform to Survey MonkeyStood up GA4 to BigQuery Data PipelineCreated 30 tailored analytics dashboards for internal business groupsSuccessfully migrated Vimeo account to Enterprise solutionMinistry of EducationOct 2021 - Feb 2023Adviser – Equity Index ImplementationImplemented "Equity Funding" to identify and respond to socio-economic barriers in schoolsWorking collaboratively with different business groups to implement the new toolPreparation of project documentation to ensure records are kept up to dateDevelopment of the future state of the project and managing risksEngaging with Ministry business unit experts to provide bespoke advice and solutionsAchievements🏆 Project won Excellence in Public Policy Award 2023 "Spirit of Service" AwardSuccessfully launched January 2023 — schools received new equity-based fundingSuccessfully transitioned multiple Ministry Initiatives to the new Equity Index systemEducation#Victoria University of Wellington2019 - 2022Bachelor of CommerceDouble major in Marketing and Management.Google2024Data Analytics Professional CertificateCompleted Google's Data Analytics Professional Certificate program.Mimo2024Introduction to PythonCompleted Introduction to Python course.Key Skills#Statistics & AnalyticsComfortable working with complex datasets, skilled at identifying and managing risk while futureproofing for further developments.Data VisualizationPowerBI & Looker dashboards to support Business Intelligence.ProgrammingSQL with BigQuery, Python scripting for APIs, EDA using Pandas.Web AnalyticsGA4, GTM custom tags based on business requirements.Stakeholder EngagementBuilding trust, influencing through strong relationships, collaborative and flexible work style.Project ImplementationEnd to end project delivery, KPI monitoring, risk assessment and reporting.DesignPhotoshop, Canva, InDesign, Visio, Premiere Pro, After Effects.
